events.title: Cisco reaches dot-com era peak
events.summary: Cisco became one of the defining infrastructure companies of the internet boom, but its valuation became extremely stretched.
events.stockLayerLesson: Even great companies can be poor investments if bought at extreme valuations.

events.title: Chuck Robbins becomes CEO
events.summary: Robbins begins leading Cisco's transition toward software, security, subscriptions and broader infrastructure platforms.
events.stockLayerLesson: CEO strategy matters when mature technology companies need to reinvent growth.

events.title: Cisco announces $28bn Splunk acquisition
events.summary: Cisco announces its intention to acquire Splunk to strengthen security, observability and AI-era data capabilities.
events.stockLayerLesson: Large acquisitions can signal strategic urgency and may reshape investor expectations.

events.title: Cisco completes Splunk acquisition
events.summary: Splunk officially becomes part of Cisco.
events.stockLayerLesson: The key question shifts from deal rationale to integration and financial impact.
